actions.javascript: () => { const normalize = (v) => (v || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const tables = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('table')); for (const table of tables) { const headers = Array.from(table.querySelectorAll('tr:first-child th')).map(th => normalize(th.textContent)); if (!headers.includes('Document Number') && !headers.includes('Name')) continue; const rows = Array.from(table.querySelectorAll('tr')).slice(1); return JSON.stringify(rows.map(row => { const cells = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll('td')).map(td => normalize(td.textContent)); const link = row.querySelector('a[href]'); return { documentNumber: cells[0] || '', name: cells[2] || '', event: cells[3] || '', status: cells[4] || '', form: cells[5] || '', formationDate: cells[6] || '', detailsUrl: link ? new URL(link.getAttribute('href'), window.location.href).toString() : '' }; })); } return '[]'; }

() => { const text = document.body.innerText || ''; const match = text.match(/Viewing page (\d+) of (\d+)/); return match ? JSON.stringify({ current: parseInt(match[1]), total: parseInt(match[2]) }) : JSON.stringify({ current: 1, total: 1 }); }

() => { const normalize = (v) => (v || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const tables = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('table')); for (const table of tables) { const headers = Array.from(table.querySelectorAll('tr:first-child th')).map(th => normalize(th.textContent)); if (!headers.includes('Document Number') && !headers.includes('Name')) continue; const rows = Array.from(table.querySelectorAll('tr')).slice(1); return JSON.stringify(rows.map(row => { const cells = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll('td')).map(td => normalize(td.textContent)); const link = row.querySelector('a[href]'); return { documentNumber: cells[0] || '', name: cells[2] || '', event: cells[3] || '', status: cells[4] || '', form: cells[5] || '', formationDate: cells[6] || '', detailsUrl: link ? new URL(link.getAttribute('href'), window.location.href).toString() : '' }; })); } return '[]'; }
